full_text:
Bian Zhang 邊章
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bian Zhang (邊章)was born in Jincheng. Forced into leading the Qiang’s in revolt against the Han alongside Han Sui. Bian Zhang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Qiang. Bian Zhang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
